context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Add missing weather fields to the conditions panel: humidity, wave direction, wave period, and always-visible precipitation.
implementation: Only the updateConditionsPanel function is modified. Added a Humidity row after Temperature using data.humidity. Expanded the Waves row to append compass direction via degToCompass(data.waveDirection). Added a Wave Period row showing data.wavePeriod in seconds. Changed precipitation to always render (removed the > 0 conditional).
